name: GermAway
description: GermAway is a fast, simple, and highly reactive survival game where your only mission is crystal clear: stay away from every germ on the screen. You control a tiny character moving through an environment filled with roaming, bouncing, and unpredictable contagious germs. They slide, swirl, chase, or drift across the arena—one touch is all it takes for the infection to spread and the game to end.
instructions: Move so that player does not toouch germs
